title: Sweet Lamb Poutine
description: A unique twist on the classic Canadian dish, featuring lamb instead of beef. Sweet and savory flavors combine in this hearty, comforting meal.
instructions: Season the lamb with salt, black pepper, and chopped thyme.
In a large Dutch oven, heat 2 tablespoons of butter over medium-high heat.
Sear the lamb cubes until browned, about 5 minutes. Remove from heat and set aside.
Add the potatoes and sweet potatoes to the pot, cooking for 5 minutes or until they start to brown.
Add the gravy and caramelized onions to the pot, stirring to combine.
Return the lamb to the pot and transfer to the preheated oven.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until the lamb is cooked through and the potatoes are tender.
Servehot, topped with crumbled feta cheese if desired.
